items.label: Passport
items.whyItMatters: Often needed across registrations and provider setup.

items.label: Marriage or partnership certificate
items.whyItMatters: May be needed for joint registration or benefits.

items.label: Employment contract or offer letter
items.whyItMatters: Often required for permit and bank account.

items.label: Proof of address (rental contract or employer letter)
CV or resume
items.whyItMatters: Keep it updated for job applications.

items.label: Diplomas or professional qualifications
items.whyItMatters: Sometimes requested by employers or for recognition.

items.label: Children's IDs and birth certificates
items.whyItMatters: Needed for school and family registration.

items.label: Proof of previous address (if required by municipality)
items.whyItMatters: Some municipalities ask for address history.

items.label: Travel or relocation insurance (before arrival)
items.whyItMatters: Coverage during the move and first days.
